name: Compound Interest Calculator
description: Industrial-grade compound interest calculator with lean and six sigma principles for financial forecasting and investment analysis.

inputs.label: Principal Amount
inputs.businessContext: Initial investment or loan amount in base currency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial investment or loan amount in base currency.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Nominal annual interest rate as a percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal annual interest rate as a percentage.

inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Number of compounding periods per year (e.g., 1=annual, 12=monthly, 365=daily).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of compounding periods per year (e.g., 1=annual, 12=monthly, 365=daily).

inputs.label: Time Period
inputs.businessContext: Total duration of investment or loan in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total duration of investment or loan in years.

inputs.label: Additional Contribution per Period
inputs.businessContext: Fixed amount added at the end of each compounding period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed amount added at the end of each compounding period.

inputs.label: Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual inflation rate for real value adjustment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual inflation rate for real value adjustment.

inputs.label: Tax Rate on Interest
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of interest earnings taxed annually.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of interest earnings taxed annually.

rules.message: Principal must be greater than zero.
Annual interest rate cannot be negative.
Time period must be greater than zero.
Compounding frequency must be between 1 and 365.

thresholds.message: Interest rate exceeds typical market rates; verify input.
Long-term projection beyond 30 years may have reduced accuracy.
Inflation rate is unusually high; consider economic context.
